title: brain note add — --json success output
description: Deterministic ingest of a PRE-AUTHORED vault note that APPLIES immediately (#262) — no preview mode. Funnels through addNote on the v2 mutation order (runMutation → commitPaths, one commit on refs/heads/main): vault-reader frontmatter validation, then id/alias/path collision refusal against the current projections, then the file lands verbatim at <dest>/<basename> as first-class vault content and the added path is committed directly. v2 (ADR-0003): NO secret scan, NO broker, NO quarantine — the retired v1 scan-before-persist / Tier-1-CAS gates are gone (git is the only safety mechanism). The added note is projection-visible after the mutation's projection + index refresh (or, on a fresh store, the next `db rebuild` + `index rebuild`).

noteId.description: The note's frontmatter id (NOT a derived source-* id).

path.description: The vault-relative path the note landed at (<dest>/<input basename>).

contentHash.description: sha256:<hex> over the exact bytes installed.

canonicalSha.description: The canonical tip after the Tier-1 CAS installed the note.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Deterministic authored-note ingest; applies immediately (v2 runMutation → commitPaths).

args.name: <path>
args.description: Path to the authored markdown note to ingest.

flags.name: --dest <folder>
flags.description: Vault-relative folder the note lands in (never sources/).

sideEffects: writes the note file verbatim at <dest>/<basename> in the working tree
commits exactly that added path directly onto refs/heads/main (the common runMutation → commitPaths order — one commit)
refreshes the LanceDB index then the SQLite projection for the added note
prohibitedEffects: never modifies or deletes ANY existing vault content (additions-only — commits only the new path)
never writes under sources/ (the ingest-only namespace)

errorCodes.when: the note fails normalization, frontmatter validation, or collides with an existing id/alias/path
another vault mutation holds the exclusive lock
a concurrent run holds the same --idempotency-key slot (key-accepting)
